sections.title: Starting out
Talking to Lucien

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I seek a hero to go on an important mission!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a mighty hero!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I require the Staff of Armadyl. But if you wish to seek it for me, you must free up some inventory space so that I can give you what you need.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I require the Staff of Armadyl. It is in the deserted Temple of Ikov, near Hemenster, north east of here.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Take care hero! There is a dangerous monster somewhere in the temple!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't you get it yourself?

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: The guardians of the Staff of Armadyl fear me!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: They have set up a magical barrier which even my power cannot overcome!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds like a laugh!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: It's not as easy as it sounds. The monster can only be killed with a weapon of ice. There are many other dangers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm up for it!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I shall give you a pendant. Without it you will not be able to enter the Chamber of Fear.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Here is my pendant. Now, I cannot stay here much longer. Meet me in my house, across the river south-east from Edgeville. It is next to the so-called Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass this time.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Hmph.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the reward?

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I see you are the mercenary type.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a living.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I will reward you well if you bring me the staff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no! Sounds far too dangerous!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Wimp! Call yourself a hero?! My daughter is more of a hero than you!

sections.title: Talking to Lucien again

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I told you not to meet me here again! Soon I will go to my house, across the river south-east from Edgeville. It is next to the so-called Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the pendant you gave me.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Imbecile!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry! Can you remind me of my mission?

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: My patience grows thin hero!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I need the Staff of Armadyl. It's in the Temple of Ikov, near Hemenster, north east of here.

sections.title: Inside the dungeon
Going downstairs without a light source
Opening the north gate without wearing a Pendant of Lucien
Opening the south Gate while it's still locked
Crossing the bridge while too heavy

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ow! Hot! Hot!

sections.title: Using lever on lever bracket
Search for traps lever
Searching ice arrow chest
Opening door in Fire warrior room

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: You will not pass!

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: Amitus! Setitii!

sections.title: Trying to open the trapdoor southeast of Lesarkus
Talking to the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: Who dares to enter the Temple of Ikov!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mighty hero!

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: Pathetic fool! Prepare to die!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A humble pilgrim.

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: I haven't seen a pilgrim for thousands of years!

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: Temple is closed!

sections.title: Attacking the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus without ice arrows

lines.speaker: Fire Warrior of Lesarkus
lines.text: Your puny weapons do nothing against me human! Come back when you can give me a real fight!

sections.title: Talking to Winelda

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Hehe! We see you're in a pickle!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Wants to be getting over the nasty lava do we?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nah, not bothered!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Hehe! Ye'll come back! They always come back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes we do!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Mocking us are we? Clever one aren't we?

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: I'm knowing some magic trickesses! I could get over easy as that!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Don't tell them! They always come! They pester poor Winelda!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're such a great witch, get me over!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: See! They pester Winelda!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can do something for you!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Good! Don't pester! Help!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Get Winelda 20 limpwurt roots for my pot.

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Then we shows them some magic!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I do!

sections.title: Talking to Winelda again

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Have you got roots for poor Winelda?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many did you need again?

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: We needs 20 Limpwurt roots for pot.

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Have you got roots for poor Winelda?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got some limpwurt roots!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: We needs 20 rooteses!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got you the limpwurt roots!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Good! Good! My potion is nearly ready! Bubble, bubble, toil and trouble!

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Now we shows them ours magic! Hold on tight!

sections.title: Talking to Winelda after giving the limpwurts

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi again. Could you do the honours again please?

lines.speaker: Winelda
lines.text: Certainly! We helps those that helps poor Winelda!

sections.title: Talking to a Guardian of Armadyl while wearing the pendant of lucien

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Thou is a foul agent of Lucien! Such an agent must die!

sections.title: Talking to a Guardian of Armadyl while not wearing the pendant of lucien

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Thou hast ventured deep into the tunnels, you have reached the temple of our master. It is many ages since a pilgrim has come here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seek the Staff of Armadyl.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: We are the guardians of the staff, our fathers were guardians and our fathers' fathers before that. Why dost thou seek it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lucien will give me a grand reward for it!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Thou art working for that spawn of evil?! Fool! You must be cleansed to save your soul!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How dare you call me a fool! I will work for whom I want!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: We must cleanse the temple!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just thought of something I must do!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: An agent of evil cannot be allowed to leave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, it's time for my yearly bath.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: You have been cleansed!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Lucien must not get hold of the staff! He would become too powerful!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Hast thou come across the undead necromancer? It was he that raised an army of the undead against Varrock a generation ago. If you know where he is you can help us defeat him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok! I'll help!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: So he is close by?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: He must be gaining in power again. If you can defeat him he will be banished from this plane for a while. You will need this pendant to attack him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! I shall not turn against my employer!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Fool! You will die for your sins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need time to think.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Linger a while and be at peace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Give it to me!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: The staff is sacred! You will not have it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I collect rare and powerful artefacts.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Your worldly greed has darkened your soul!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Out of my way fool!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: I may be a fool but I will not step aside!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Only members of our order are allowed to handle the staff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then you must die!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right, I will go now.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: That is a wise decision. Stay a while and let your soul be cleansed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are your kind and what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: We are the Guardians of Armadyl. We have kept the temple safe for many ages. The evil in the dungeons seek what lies here. The Mahjarrat are the worst.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Armadyl?

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Armadyl is the god we serve. We have been charged with guarding his sacred arctifacts until he requires them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Go in peace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone told me there were only three gods. Saradomin, Zamorak and Guthix.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Saradominists. Bleh. They only acknowledge those three. There are at least twenty gods!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are the Mahjarrat?

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: They are ancient and powerful beings! They are very evil! It is said that they once dominated this plane of existence, Zamorak was supposedly of their blood. They are far fewer in number now.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Some still have presence in this world in their liche forms. Mahjarrat such as Lucien and Azzanadra would become very powerful if they came into possession of the Staff of Armadyl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you say Lucien? It was Lucien that asked me to get the staff!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: You are a fool to be working for Lucien! Your soul must be cleansed to save you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you're doing a good job then!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Do not fear! We are devoted to our charge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow! You must be really old!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: No! I am not old! My family has guarded the staff for many generations.

sections.title: Talking to a Guardian of Armadyl while carrying the staff of Armadyl

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Halt! You will not leave here with the Staff of Armadyl!

sections.title: Talking to the Guardian of Armadyl after agreeing to kill Lucien

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Have you killed Lucien?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, I've lost the pendant you gave me!

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Hurry friend! Time is against us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: Hurry friend! Time is against us!

sections.title: Taking the Staff of armadyl after agreeing to kill Lucien
Taking the Staff of armadyl while helping Lucien

lines.speaker: Guardian of Armadyl
lines.text: That is not thine to take!

sections.title: Finishing up
Talking to Lucien near Varrock

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Have you got the Staff of Armadyl yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! Here it is.

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: Muhahahhahahaha!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I can feel the power of the staff running through me! I will be more powerful and they shall bow down to me!

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: I suppose you want your reward? I shall grant you much power!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

sections.title: Attacking Lucien without wearing the Armadyl pendant

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: You don't want to attack me. I am your friend.

sections.title: Killing Lucien

lines.speaker: Lucien
lines.text: You have defeated me for now! I shall reappear in the North!
